evals.name: explore-document
evals.prompt: What's in evals/files/report.odt? Describe its structure and content.
evals.expected_output: A summary of the document: a Project Status Report with 3 headings (Executive Summary, Current Progress, Next Steps), and the key content under each — including the Q1 2025 delivery date, the three progress items with percentages, and the next steps.
assertions: Response mentions the document title or describes it as a project status report
Response identifies the three headings: Executive Summary, Current Progress, and Next Steps
Response mentions at least one of the progress percentages (85%, 60%, or 40%)
Response does not hallucinate sections or content that don't exist

evals.name: precise-block-lookup
evals.prompt: In evals/files/report.odt, what is the text at block index 6?
assertions: Response states the text 'Testing: 60% complete'
Response identifies the correct index (6)

evals.name: list-headings
evals.prompt: What sections does evals/files/report.odt have? List the headings.
evals.expected_output: Three headings: Executive Summary (index 2), Current Progress (index 4), Next Steps (index 8).
assertions: Response lists Executive Summary as a heading
Response lists Current Progress as a heading
Response lists Next Steps as a heading
Response does not list non-heading blocks as headings

evals.name: append-content
evals.prompt: Add a new paragraph 'Risks: None identified at this time.' to the end of evals/files/report.odt.
evals.expected_output: A new paragraph is appended at the end of the document. The file is saved and the addition is confirmed.
assertions: Response confirms the paragraph was added successfully
The last block in the output file contains 'Risks: None identified at this time.'
No existing blocks were modified

evals.name: find-replace
evals.prompt: In evals/files/notes.odt, replace all occurrences of 'Friday' with 'end of sprint'.
evals.expected_output: The word 'Friday' in Alice's action item is replaced with 'end of sprint'. The file is saved.
assertions: Response confirms the replacement was made
The file no longer contains the word 'Friday'
Alice's action item now reads 'Alice: Update deployment scripts by end of sprint.'

evals.name: create-with-content
evals.prompt: Create a new ODT document at /tmp/memo.odt with the title 'Weekly Memo', then add a heading 'Action Items' followed by a paragraph 'Complete the ODT skill implementation.'
evals.expected_output: A new file /tmp/memo.odt is created with the title 'Weekly Memo'. It has one heading ('Action Items') and one paragraph ('Complete the ODT skill implementation.').
assertions: Response confirms the file was created
The file has a heading 'Action Items'
The file has a paragraph 'Complete the ODT skill implementation.'
file-info shows total_blocks of 2

evals.name: index-out-of-range-error
evals.expected_output: A clear error that the index 999 is out of range, along with how many blocks the document actually has.
assertions: Response communicates that the index was out of range
Response mentions the actual block count or valid range
